data.title: Gary Black Left Unimpressed By Rivian's Earnings : Calls 2025 Guidance 'Clearly Weak'
data.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. shares rose over 5% in after-hours trading Wednesday before pulling back, despite delivering conservative 2025 guidance, as strong regulatory credit sales helped the electric vehicle maker beat fourth-quarter expectations.

data.title: Meta Stock Has Soared Almost 50% Over A Year But Now The Company Is Slashing Staff Stock Awards As It Braces To Face OpenAI, Amazon And Others In AI Race
data.description: Meta is reportedly reducing employee stock awards by 10% while ramping up AI investments to as much as $65 billion in 2025.

data.title: Alibaba Says If Artificial Intelligence Is Like Electricity, Then Its Cloud Computing Network Is The Power Grid: The Money Is In Powering AI, Not Selling It
data.description: Alibaba executives emphasized that the true value of artificial intelligence lies in cloud computing infrastructure rather than AI models, positioning the company's cloud division as the key driver of future monetization.

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Slams Biden's Crypto Policies As 'Incredibly Destructive' While Aligning With Trump — Looking For A Pardon?
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, who is currently serving a 25-year sentence for the FTX scam, shared his disapproval of the previous  Joe Biden administration and expressed sympathy toward President Donald Trump, according to an interview from his prison released Thursday.

data.title: From COLAs To Taxes: Trump's Social Security Changes So Far
